module_mood_contract: Joyful creation — 'it works, on my repo.' Student discovers the compound loop on a real bug from their own backlog; the artifact (CLAUDE.local.md born from session evidence) is unambiguously theirs. M2 owns grounded-competence on multi-file plan-mode work; M1 must not pre-empt it.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood contract named; mood-floor 8+/10 applies to TEACHING beats.
Strategy-fidelity — don't front-run downstream teaching moments.
Strategic themes recur in Key Concepts (module-specific instances).
Key Concepts shape — theme breadcrumbs, not standalone section.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 41-45: three breadcrumbs across six bullets ('context is what you put in it', 'claims aren't evidence', 'rules grow from evidence, not blank pages') — at the ceiling but in range. Engineer register, no theme-N notation, no standalone Themes section.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: What You'll Learn — capability register, strategic theme verbs lead.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 14-17: Run / Introspect / Fix / Compound lead four bullets; verb + immediate object; the M1 trailing-fragment carve-out (line 17 — 'The first move outside the repo') is in-spec.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Meta-frame lectures are closers, not openers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 25-27 openers ('Painting the picture with the LLM' + 'The wizard move') are demo/ceiling — wizard move per maintainer line 72 is a trainer-demo on a volunteer's codebase, ceiling-showing not meta-naming. Line 35 closer ('How this training was built') is meta-frame and lands after the loop has been lived.
M1 is joyful-creation, not contrast-mood. Rule fires on M5-style modules.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Module file has no inline fenced prompts; the three exercises (orient-and-introspect, fix-tests-first, compound-and-close) hold the prompts. Rule evaluated on the exercise files, not the module page.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Body teaches the work; trainer manages the room outside text. Connections opener carve-out.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 22 — 'Everyone names a trick first; the training picks up from there.' Bare harvest sentence in Connections opener — explicit rule-27 carve-out per 2026-05-03 (Connections room-read carve-out). No 'share with your neighbor' / 'tell the room' phrases anywhere else in body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Per-exercise leap test — three observable Monday-morning outcomes.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 97-100: three falsifiable Monday-morning outcomes named — /context as deliberate move, failing-test-before-fix in commit history, CLAUDE.local.md rule quoting a specific session moment. Each is falsifiable on the engineer's own scrollback / commit history.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Artefact contracts — every produced artefact with a stable identifier gets a contract row.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 104-109: two contract rows (incoming bug, CLAUDE.local.md as the cross-module producer). PR + closed ticket carve-out named explicitly (line 109).
Lines 113-123: nine forcing-function rows, each with dominant failure mode + one escape-hatch push-back move. Maintainer block carries the design context per AE101 convention.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No module-name references in prompt prose.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Module file carries no fenced prompts — rule fires on registry / inline prompt bodies, not module-page prose.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood lands per phase + close (mood_score >= 8 on teaching beats; <7 = REVISE).
rules_evaluated.evidence: Phase 1 = 8 (teaching beat — joyful creation, with the wizard-move-variance reason for not-9 noted). Close = 8. No beat below 7.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Mood doesn't resolve early — M1 doesn't pre-empt M2.
rules_evaluated.evidence: M1's assigned mood is joyful creation, not unease — the no-resolve rule is structurally N/A on the steal-direction. On the forward-hook side: lines 47-48 Next section hands off explicitly to M2 plan-mode pressure on multi-file work, opening rather than closing the next module's tension.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Teaching moment lands across persona-skill variation.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Two felt moments — /context reveals smaller-than-expected unread slice (Ex1) + Jira ticket closes from inside Claude Code (Ex3). Both are artifact-level surprises that don't depend on persona discipline; persona could not skip them and still complete the loop.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Big Idea fidelity — file honors the strategy-doc Big Idea.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Line 6 Big Idea matches strategy doc M1 row (line 235 of content-strategy-agentic-engineering-101.md) — three-exercises-one-loop, joyful creation, compound loop closes outside the repo via connector. No reframing.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Module-to-module arc — close hands off to next module's open.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Lines 47-48 Next section names plan mode earning its keep on multi-file work + CLAUDE.local.md as auto-loaded context the M2 session opens with. Matches strategy doc M2-in-detail (line 296 of strategy doc) — grounded competence on plan-reading craft on multi-file work.
